message:
fix(ui): YAML-escape all frontmatter fields, not just title

Assignee, status, type, and label values were written to YAML
frontmatter without escaping. If any contained YAML-special characters
(: # {} etc.), the frontmatter would be malformed and parsing would fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
